ddls:
CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code of the currency (e.g., EUR, USD) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency (e.g., Euro, US Dollar) */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Current exchange rate of the currency relative to a base currency (e.g., USD) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the currency record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counterparties" (
  "counterparty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each counterparty */,
  "counterparty_name" TEXT /* Name of the counterparty */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the counterparty */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the counterparty */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the counterparty */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Credit rating of the counterparty */,
  "legal_entity_id" TEXT /* Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) of the counterparty */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax Identification Number (TIN) of the counterparty */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the counterparty record */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the counterparty record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("counterparty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "redemption_types" (
  "redemption_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each redemption type */,
  "redemption_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the redemption type (e.g., Hard Bullet) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the redemption type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("redemption_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lcr_hqla_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LCR HQLA category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Yes, No) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user record */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the financial instrument */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the financial instrument was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
